summary: Classified #53486 as the live canonical issue for this cluster. Current main at 827402243d7fb307ea7ee4aa0cd398815ff00d23 still routes plain Feishu message text through the payload path without parsing JSON card strings, so a narrow credited replacement fix PR is the canonical path; no close or merge action is safe yet. Security-sensitive hydrated context refs are routed individually without blocking the non-security #53486 fix lane. Blocked-label source PRs #93706 and #94262 are kept only as non-mutating related evidence and removed from executable fix lineage.

actions.reason: Real non-security bug remains on current main and no viable open canonical PR exists.

repair_candidate.summary: Open a narrow credited replacement PR for #53486 so Feishu message(action=send) recognizes a valid interactive-card JSON string in the plain message/text payload and sends it via the Feishu interactive card path instead of as post text.
repair_candidate.pr_title: fix(feishu): send plain card JSON as interactive cards
repair_candidate.pr_body:
## What Problem This Solves

Fixes #53486. Feishu `message(action=send)` can receive a valid interactive-card JSON string in the plain `message` parameter, but current main treats that string as ordinary text and sends it as a post message.

## Why This Change Was Made

The proactive message tool path builds a payload with `payload.text`, then Feishu forwards it through `feishuOutbound.sendPayload`. Today that path only recognizes cards from `channelData.feishu`, presentation, or interactive payloads, so plain card JSON falls through to `sendMessageFeishu` and renders as text.

This PR keeps the fix in the Feishu plugin boundary by detecting a valid Feishu card JSON object from the payload text, sanitizing it like native card payloads, and sending it through `sendCardFeishu`. Invalid JSON or non-card text should continue through the existing text/media fallback.

## User Impact

Users can again use Feishu `message(action=send)` for interactive-card JSON without the card body being displayed as raw text.

## Evidence

- Current main checked at 827402243d7fb307ea7ee4aa0cd398815ff00d23.
- Expected validation: `pnpm test extensions/feishu/src/outbound.test.ts`, `pnpm test extensions/feishu/src/channel.test.ts`, and `pnpm check:changed`.

## Credit

Clownfish is carrying this fix forward from a prior closed attempt and preserving attribution:

- Thanks @ZenoRewn for the original report in #53486.
- Thanks @martingarramon for source PR https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/77268.
credit_notes: Preserve attribution for @ZenoRewn as the reporter of #53486.
Carry forward and credit @martingarramon for source PR https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/77268.
